summary: Iteration 6: Full testing of new Admin-View (GEMELDET tab), bulk actions, Session definition reveal, and new endpoints. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: 'Function components cannot be given refs' from framer-motion AnimatePresence mode='popLayout'. Exit animations on dismiss/delete may not run correctly. Fix: use motion.div directly or wrap with React.forwardRef.

integration_issues.flow: GEMELDET tab badge on initial load
integration_issues.issue: Badge count on GEMELDET tab is 0 on initial page load. It only shows after clicking the tab (because ReportedTab is rendered lazily). Users cannot see badge count without clicking tab first. Spec says 'Tab erscheint mit Badge-Zahl'. Fix: fetch reportedCount in StudyPackDetail fetchData on mount.

All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token): PASS
action_items: Fix React ref warning: ReportedConceptRow used inside AnimatePresence mode='popLayout' needs forwardRef. Wrap motion.div in React.forwardRef or switch to non-popLayout mode.
UX: Fetch reportedCount in StudyPackDetail.fetchData() on initial mount so badge shows without requiring tab click first.
critical_code_review_comments: Badge loads lazily: reportedCount stays 0 until tab click since ReportedTab is only rendered when activeTab === 'reported'. Should pre-fetch count in parent's fetchData().
AnimatePresence mode='popLayout' requires forwardRef on child components. ReportedConceptRow as a plain function component causes React warning. Exit animations are broken.
server.py is 2202 lines - should be split into router modules (pre-existing, reported in iter4/5).

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all features working, 1 minor ref warning, 1 minor UX issue (badge not shown on initial load)

seed_data_creation: Test dismissed concept 69a82cf3c7c639682e4e9255 during UI test, immediately re-reported via API to restore state. All 6 originally reported concepts restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: GEMELDET tab (6 reported concepts), bulk dismiss/delete, session reveal (definition hidden until reveal), report button with toast. Backend endpoints all working. Minor issue: badge count not shown on initial load (lazy rendering). Minor React warning for AnimatePresence ref. Test user: test_km_tester@example.com / password123. Pack 69a82c7bc7c639682e4e9224 (W&G ES5, 933 concepts, 6 reported).
rca_of_issues: 1. AnimatePresence forwardRef warning: framer-motion's mode='popLayout' requires child components to forward refs to allow exit animation measurement. ReportedConceptRow returns motion.div directly but the function component itself isn't wrapped with forwardRef, so PopChild's ref attachment fails. Fix: wrap ReportedConceptRow with React.forwardRef() or use AnimatePresence without mode='popLayout'. 2. Badge lazy load: reportedCount is initialized to 0 and only updated when ReportedTab mounts (which only happens on tab click). Parent component needs to call listReportedConcepts in its initial fetchData and setReportedCount from the response.
